task:
Open /home/user/Documents/photo.png in GIMP.

Crop the image to the top-left 400x300 region (starting at origin (0,0)), then rotate the cropped result 90 degrees clockwise. Export the final image as PNG to /home/user/Documents/photo_cropped_rotated.png. The output dimensions must be 300x400.

verification.description: Output image has dimensions 300x400 (400x300 crop rotated 90 degrees CW)
Output file is in PNG format
